[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.0.0...v8.1.0)

#### What's Changed

- Run apt-get update before installing packages by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​219](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/219)
- build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.36.10 to 1.36.11 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​218](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/218)
- crit: Add support for TaskState decoding by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​220](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/220)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.0.0...v8.1.0>
